SEQUENCE.COMMENT: check if dependency captured within period

MAP.NAME: $default
MAP.COMMENT: Else leave the status as is COMPLETEDINTIMENODEPENDENCY

Values.value: Processing finished to determine if period status has to be updated or not. Period status value is set at %updatePeriodStatus%

INVOKE.COMMENT: invoke publish issue award service VE-969 maped the period status because in runtime pipelie was wrong status comming 'periodStatus' key from previous step

BRANCH.COMMENT: if challenge finished before period end

Values.value: current date is not withing period end date, so no more future challenge creation

INVOKE.COMMENT: -- Update Challenge Id Details in Social Interaction Member --

record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

record.name: type
record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg
